title: RENDER — The Vaporwave Food Court

features.name: the plastic palms
features.desc-on-touch: potted palm plants rendered in low-poly fern geometry, neon pink, swaying to a bass note that exists only in the archive's playback. they cast shadows on surfaces that don't reflect light

features.name: the jetpack bushranger
features.desc-on-touch: a figure in colonial riding coat and helmet, but with a glitching jetpack, idling by the fountain. their silhouette phases between solid and vector. they haven't moved in decades. the archive is unsure if they're waiting or if they're already long gone

features.name: the fountain
features.desc-on-touch: flowing with static instead of water, a white-noise cascade catching every neon colour at once. the harbour doesn't hold water anymore; it holds the record of holding water, and this fountain holds the record of that record

features.name: the signage
features.desc-on-touch: neon tubing reading THEIR MOST AUGUST PUBLIC ORGAN, glitching between that phrase and others you can almost read. the archive is trying to tell you something but its grammar is corrupting

features.name: the food counter
features.desc-on-touch: rendered in impossible isometric perspective, items on the menu flickering—fish and chips, but also field recordings; dim sum, but also decimal coordinates; each item is both food and archive file

inscription: ERROR: metaphor detected in storage layer—the food court is not a place, it's a mode of being read. you are not eating here; you are being consumed by what eats you

file.name: Diagnostic_Kiosk_Food_Vendor_Records_1998_2011_Digitized_Menu.html
file.note: historical menu data, purchasing records—but each item purchased now cross-references a different file from the archive, until food and data become indistinguishable, and eating becomes reading become

exits.label: back through the double doors into the kiosk
through the food counter, into behind-the-scenes spaces where food is prepared from static and light
the bushranger's jetpack, somehow accessible, ascending toward neon cloud cover
exits.to: NEW: the high country render—Australian landscape translated to pure colour and wireframe, all the earth made diagonal

exits.label: beneath the fountain, a floor grate leading down
